# Cover and Front Matter {#fm-placeholder .unnumbered}

<br>

![](images/Cover.svg)

<br>

::: {.text-center style="font-size: 0.8rem;"}

© 2026 Agile Publishers and the Authors

All rights reserved.

<br>

Published by **Agile Publishers** in Merced, California. 

Agile Publishers is an imprint of _SubtleTea Solutions, LLC_.

:::
